title: aerides tessellata
intro: Aerides tessellata, also known as the tessellated orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Aerides tessellata include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve making tea or infusions from its flowers and leaves, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
